response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished polyglot engineer with strong testing culture and communication skills, but he does not meet the role's mandatory requirements. His C++ exposure amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 plus a thesis project, far short of 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++; his database background is MySQL/MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle; and he has no fixed-income or capital-markets domain experience, with RIDE Capital being a Node/TypeScript fintech role rather than investment banking work.
strengths: Experience building low-latency, high-throughput backend systems (DLang microservices handling millions of requests per second)
Strong CI/CD, DevOps, and software craftsmanship background (TDD, trunk-based development, test tooling)
Excellent communication skills evidenced by conference talks, workshops, and teaching courses
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~7 months in 2014-2015), versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work is MySQL and MongoDB
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and CI/CD fundamentals
